findings.evidence: `rg -n "instance : threeCycleMeasure.IsAddRightInvariant"` hits line 62, with no preceding `/-- ... -/` docstring.
findings.fix: Add a docstring before the instance explaining that the uniform/counting law on `ZMod 3` is invariant under right addition and that this supports the shift-stationarity proof.
findings.issue: The exported instance `threeCycleMeasure.IsAddRightInvariant` has no docstring, even though it supplies a public instance used to justify translation invariance of the stationary law.

findings.evidence: `rg -n "instance : IsProbabilityMeasure threeCycleMeasure"` hits line 66, with no preceding `/-- ... -/` docstring.
findings.fix: Add a docstring before the instance stating that the normalized counting measure on `ZMod 3` has total mass one.
findings.issue: The exported instance `IsProbabilityMeasure threeCycleMeasure` has no docstring, despite being a public instance certifying that the displayed uniform law is a probability measure.

summary: The new file has a useful module docstring and documents the main exported results, but it leaves two exported instances undocumented. Those instances are part of the public API and should say why instance search needs them for this example.
